ValidationRule.description: Enforces valid status transitions. Cannot jump from draft directly to invoiced/completed without intermediate states.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status__c), OR( AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "draft", NOT(OR(Status__c = "posted", Status__c = "quoted", Status__c = "cancelled"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "posted", NOT(OR(Status__c = "quoted", Status__c = "tendered", Status__c = "cancelled"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "quoted", NOT(OR(Status__c = "tendered", Status__c = "posted", Status__c = "cancelled"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "tendered", NOT(OR(Status__c = "accepted", Status__c = "cancelled"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "accepted", NOT(OR(Status__c = "dispatched", Status__c = "cancelled"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "dispatched", NOT(OR(Status__c = "in_transit", Status__c = "cancelled"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "in_transit", NOT(OR(Status__c = "delivered", Status__c = "exception", Status__c = "cancelled"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "delivered", NOT(OR(Status__c = "pod_captured", Status__c = "exception", Status__c = "cancelled"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "pod_captured", NOT(OR(Status__c = "invoiced", Status__c = "exception", Status__c = "disputed"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "invoiced", NOT(OR(Status__c = "settled", Status__c = "disputed"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "settled", NOT(OR(Status__c = "completed", Status__c = "disputed"))), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "completed", Status__c != "completed"), AND(PRIORVALUE(Status__c) = "cancelled", Status__c != "cancelled") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid status transition. Please follow the workflow: Draft → Posted/Quoted → Tendered → Accepted → Dispatched → In Transit → Delivered → POD Captured → Invoiced → Settled → Completed. Cancelled is a terminal state.
